Idioma.MSG_Debe_elegir_una_fecha_valida_para_Fe: - It should elect a valid date for the field: Date since
Should select a valid date for the field: Date to
Idioma.AYUDA_EstaConsultaMuestraListadoDeExcepc: This consultation shows a listing of the Exceptions (Weaknesses) according to the Employee, the Functional Center, the Date since and the Date to. Of be not specified the Employee and/or the Functional Center, all the they are listed Employees and/or Fun
